# clo_dbaas_backup (Resource)

Create a backup of a managed-database (dbaas) cluster or a single database. Set `cluster_id` for a FULL backup or `database_id` for a PARTIAL backup (exactly one is required).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A FULL backup of an entire managed-database cluster.
resource "clo_dbaas_backup" "cluster_backup" {
  cluster_id = clo_dbaas_cluster.cluster_1.id
  name       = "nightly-full"
}

# A PARTIAL backup of a single database. Set force_delete to remove it even when
# it is the parent of later incremental backups.
resource "clo_dbaas_backup" "database_backup" {
  database_id  = clo_dbaas_database.app.id
  name         = "app-only"
  force_delete = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster to back up. Produces a FULL backup. Exactly one of `cluster_id` or `database_id` is required.
- `database_id` (String) ID of the database to back up. Produces a PARTIAL backup. Exactly one of `cluster_id` or `database_id` is required.
- `force_delete` (Boolean) Delete the backup even when it is the parent of other (incremental) backups. Applied at destroy time.
- `name` (String) Name of the backup. If omitted, the server assigns one.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_in` (String) Timestamp the backup was created
- `data_size` (Number) Backed-up data size in bytes
- `datastore_name` (String) Database engine of the backup's datastore
- `datastore_version` (String) Database engine version of the backup's datastore
- `id` (String) ID of the backup
- `parent` (String) ID of the parent backup, for incremental backups
- `project` (String) ID of the project the backup belongs to
- `size` (Number) Total backup size in bytes
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status of the backup
- `type` (String) Backup type (`FULL`, `PARTIAL` or `INCREMENTAL`)

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `read` (String)
- `update` (String)
